_note: Indonesia robusta weather-analog forecast. Mahalanobis on 24-dim (rain, temp, rain_anom, SPI z, SPEI z, ONI) × 4 phenology stages. Detrended production residuals. Walk-forward backtest. Bootstrap 95% CI on ensemble.
harvest_period: May-Aug of crop_year (dominant cycle; smaller flush usually Nov-Jan)
production_seed_note: Plumb in real AEKI / Indonesian BPS series for production-grade accuracy.
